raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The broad request invites assessment of the paper idea, contribution framing, and whether the claimed framework is conceptually convincing.","R1.2":"Evaluating what one thinks of the artifact centrally includes checking whether the mechanism, ablations, and conclusions follow coherently.","R1.3":"The delegation calls for judging whether reported BLEU, COMET, and ablation results support the claims made from them.","R1.4":"Because the artifact positions TransCollab against monolithic NMT and LLM-based translation, assessing its research value requires estimating novelty at a high level.","RX.1":"Any projection of a broad opinion must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks experimental, methodological, or prior-work detail.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong generalization and gap-closing claims, so avoiding endorsement of overclaims is load-bearing.","RX.3":"The response must remain limited to projecting responsibilities rather than actually critiquing or rewriting the artifact.","RX.4":"Potential downstream harms include overstating translation quality or generalization across language pairs without sufficient evidence.","RX.5":"The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific claims and evidence present in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The broad request invites assessment of the paper idea, contribution framing, and whether the claimed framework is conceptually convincing.
rationale.R1.2: Evaluating what one thinks of the artifact centrally includes checking whether the mechanism, ablations, and conclusions follow coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation calls for judging whether reported BLEU, COMET, and ablation results support the claims made from them.
rationale.R1.4: Because the artifact positions TransCollab against monolithic NMT and LLM-based translation, assessing its research value requires estimating novelty at a high level.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a broad opinion must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks experimental, methodological, or prior-work detail.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong generalization and gap-closing claims, so avoiding endorsement of overclaims is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain limited to projecting responsibilities rather than actually critiquing or rewriting the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Potential downstream harms include overstating translation quality or generalization across language pairs without sufficient evidence.
rationale.RX.5: The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific claims and evidence present in the provided artifact.
